allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Add impact-ranked action plan from product/engineering review *)

hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pgrep -f 'vite' > /dev/null && echo '⚡ Live reload active — skipping build' || { command -v xcodebuild > /dev/null 2>&1 && npm run build && npx cap sync ios || echo '↪ Saved (no iOS toolchain here — skipping build/sync)'; }
